findings.evidence: New declarations are at `FiniteProduct.lean:50-86`; Mathlib already has `ObjectProperty.IsClosedUnderFiniteProducts` giving `HasFiniteProducts P.FullSubcategory` at `Mathlib/CategoryTheory/ObjectProperty/FiniteProducts.lean:84-107`, and `FGModuleCat` follows the standard finite-limits pattern at `Mathlib/Algebra/Category/FGModuleCat/Limits.lean:57-78`.
findings.fix: Register the existing `ComoduleCat.prod` cone as a categorical product and prove `ComoduleCat.isFG` is closed under binary/finite products using `Module.Finite.prod`, then expose `HasBinaryProducts`/`HasFiniteProducts` for `FGComoduleCat`; keep only comparison and simp lemmas needed for the concrete carrier.
findings.issue: `prod`, `prodFst`, `prodSnd`, and `prodLift` mirror the standard `Limits` product API but are packaged only as TauCeti-specific names, so downstream code cannot reuse `HasBinaryProducts`/`HasFiniteProducts` infrastructure.

summary: The PR adds a bespoke finite-product API for `FGComoduleCat` where Mathlib already provides the standard full-subcategory finite-products mechanism; this should be integrated with the categorical product API rather than creating a parallel surface.
